accurate.why: All claims faithfully track the bill text and accurate context.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated or contradictory claims present.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the bill directs a National Academies study on cancer among military aircrew.

changes_to_existing_law.why: The bill creates a new study mandate and does not amend existing law.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the reporting/briefing conditions triggered if the deadline is missed and the covered-individual eligibility limits.

effective_dates.why: Correctly states the 30-day and 60-day deadlines and 60-day briefing intervals.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures agreement, study scope, data sources, reporting, and definitions accurately.

correct_entities.why: Correctly names the VA Secretary, National Academies, committees, and NDAA FY2021 study.

correct_figures.why: The 30-day, 60-day deadlines and cancer types are stated correctly.
